basic_details.job_title: DMRC General Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: The Delhi Metro Rail Corporation (DMRC) General Manager Notification 2026 has been released on 30 April 2026 on the official website www.delhimetrorail.com . A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the DMRC General Manager Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 57 years Age Relaxation for Deputation: Maximum 55 years

qualification.education_qualification: IRSEE Officer, Varied experience in Rolling Stock, 18 years Gazetted/Executive service, Level 14 Pay Matrix (Rs.144200-218200)
qualification.details: IRSEE officers of Indian Railways with varied experience in Rolling Stock department, conversant with computerized environment, free from D&AR/Vigilance, working in Level 14 (Rs.144200-218200) of 7th CPC, minimum 18 years Gazetted/Executive service.

salary_details.details: Rs. 1,20,000-2,80,000 (Direct); Parent pay + deputation allowance (Deputation) Per Month

selection_process: Personal Interview Medical fitness examination (Direct Recruitment)
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DMRC General Manager Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.delhimetrorail.com.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 21-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DMRC General Manager (Rolling Stock) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the DMRC General Manager (Rolling Stock) post is 21st May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be IRSEE officers of Indian Railways with substantial experience in the Rolling Stock department and a minimum of 18 years of Gazetted/Executive service.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the General Manager (Rolling Stock) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this post is 57 years. For deputation, the maximum age is relaxed to 55 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the General Manager (Rolling Stock) role?
faq.answer: The salary for the General Manager (Rolling Stock) post ranges from Rs. 1,20,000 to Rs. 2,80,000 per month, with additional deputation allowance for deputation posts.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this DMRC job?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the address mentioned in the official notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies released by DMRC?
faq.answer: Delhi Metro Rail Corporation has released a total of 1 vacancy for the post of General Manager (Rolling Stock).

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the DMRC General Manager post?
faq.answer: The selection process for this post includes a Personal Interview. For direct recruitment, a medical fitness examination is also part of the process.

faq.question: Q9. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the Delhi Metro Rail Corporation (DMRC), a prominent public sector undertaking.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the DMRC's official website, the link for which is provided in the Important Links section of this article.
